A test case to verify that dividing 1 by the tangent of -0 returns -Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests the behavior of the `Math.tan` function in JavaScript. It checks if dividing 1 by the tangent of negative zero results in negative infinity. The assertion uses the `assert` function to verify that the expression evaluates to `-Infinity`, which is the expected outcome according to the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its compliance with expected standards.
